title: Garlic Greek Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry made with the bold flavors of Greece. This dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the stir-fry vegetables and cook for 3-4 minutes until tender.
Sprinkle the Greek seasoning over the top and cook for an additional minute.
If using feta cheese, stir it in during the last minute of cooking.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or with pita bread.
